content: The product is too expensive for our budget. We need more flexible pricing options or a free tier for small teams.
Manual data entry is taking up 20 hours per week. We desperately need workflow automation for our repetitive tasks.
The dashboard is hard to use and the reporting features are limited. We can't get the insights we need without exporting to Excel.
Integration with our existing tools is problematic. We use HubSpot, Zapier, and Slack but the plugins often break.
Customer support response time averages 48 hours. We need faster support for production issues. Live chat or phone support would be beneficial.
